working_on: Engine/product migration cross-reference sweep (S-0024 continuation): repair the 15 cross_reference_broken soft-warns from product/docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md, sweep the rest of the migrated tree for stale relative-path links, settle the CROSS_REFERENCES.md asymmetry decision (stay-product-side vs split engine+product), close validate.py at 0 hard-fails AND 0 soft-warns.
outcome_summary: Engine/product partition referentially closed. Repaired the 15 cross_reference_broken soft-warns in product/docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md by rebasing every link for product/docs/ depth (root files via ../../ROADMAP.md, engine-side via ../../engine/...). Asymmetry decision settled: CROSS_REFERENCES.md stays product-side as a single change-propagation index spanning both subtrees — the bulk of dependencies are product-product, and the procedural-dependencies section is too thin (4 entries) to justify a parallel engine index. Bulk sweep: 356 stale links repaired across 38 files via a partition-aware mechanical mapper (adr/0NNN, docs/operations, docs/X, STATE.md, ENGINE_LOG.md, CHANGELOG.md, AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, tools/X, session/X, plus same-directory ADR sibling refs that crossed the partition); 8 hand-fixed residuals (build_plan ADR 0016 partition-side correction, M_partition_migration part2-fallback rewrite, P_4/P_5 forward-pointing seed-graph paths converted to inline-code, OQ-OUTWARD-VOICE doc-voice path, build_plan/00_session_schedule.md ui-architecture link, STATE.md build_plan/ link + example syntax). Exempt from sweep: HANDOFF.md and engine/ENGINE_LOG.md (dated narrative, paths reflect the layout at write time); engine/session/archive/ JSON also exempt. Auxiliary: .gitignore rule rebased from tools/validate-history.jsonl to engine/tools/validate-history.jsonl and the file untracked via git rm --cached (S-0024 left the per-clone telemetry tracked because the gitignore match broke). validate.py: 11 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns at session close. Three commits: eager-claim, CROSS_REFERENCES.md repair, bulk sweep + .gitignore + ENGINE_LOG/STATE update. Next: S-0026 — Phase 3 SQL Schema Implementation per build_plan/P_1_sql_schema.md.
